title: CPVP/BEDWARS
description: Simple Pvp Texturepacks For all kinds of pvp
body:
- Bedwars/CPVP Texturepack 
- With
- no crystal explosion
- low shield
- better gui
- low fire
- small totem pop
- edited cpvp and bedwars textures
- fewer particle
- Also my first pvp texturepack
- Hope you have fun with the texturepack
